facts: NIT Nagaland is a National Institute of Technology located in Nagaland, India.

The college offers B.Tech programs in CIV (Civil), MECH (Mechanical), ECE (Electronics and Communication), CSE (Computer Science), EEE (Electrical and Electronics), and EIE (Electronics and Instrumentation).
Groups: Grp-I covers CIV, MECH, ECE and Grp-II covers CSE, EEE, EIE.
Boys hostel Shillo-A is for 2nd year students, each room has 3-sharing.
Boys hostel Shillo-B is for 4th year students, each room has 3-sharing.
New boys hostel is for 1st year students, each room has 3-sharing.
All boys hostels have 3-sharing rooms.
Girls hostel Patkai-A is for PhD and 2nd year students, each room has 3-sharing.
Girls hostel Patkai-B is for 2nd year students, each room has 3-sharing.
Girls hostel Patkai-C is for 2nd year students, each room has 3-sharing.

boys_mess: Japfu mess serves 1st year and 3rd year boys.
Sholli mess serves 2nd year, PhD, and 4th year boys.
girls_mess: Girls mess locations: Patkai (A, B, C), Tiyi, Dzukou.

monday.dinner: Egg Curry + Fish Curry + Banana Kopta + Rice + Dal Fry

tuesday.dinner: Chicken + Seasonal Veg + Plain Rice + Dal Fry

wednesday.lunch: Nutrela + Chutney + Salad + Rice + Plain Dal
wednesday.dinner: Egg Curry + Paneer Chole + Rice + Dal Fry

thursday.lunch: Mixed Veg (Seasonal) + Rice + Plain Dal + Salad
thursday.dinner: Kheer + Chole Bhature + Rice + Dal Fry

friday.dinner: Chicken Curry + Seasonal Veg + Rice + Dal Fry

saturday.lunch: Salad + Mixed Veg + Rice + Plain Dal
saturday.dinner: Egg Curry + Fish Curry + Malai Kopta + Rice + Dal Fry

sunday.lunch: Rajma + Dry Pakoda + Rice + Plain Dal
sunday.dinner: Chicken Bamboo Shoot + Chicken Curry + Kadhai Paneer + Sweet + Plain Rice + Dal Fry

mess.cuisine: Mix of North Indian, non-veg heavy (chicken, fish, egg curry). Sunday dinner is the most elaborate with Chicken Bamboo Shoot (local Naga dish).
mess.note: This is the proposed new mess schedule.

facts: WiFi is available on campus.
LAN is also available.
75% attendance is mandatory.
Dance club is available.
Music club is available.
Photography club is available.
Drawing club is available.
Ekarikthin is the college fest.
Hornbill is another college fest (named after the Hornbill Festival of Nagaland).
Cricket, football, volleyball, badminton, and basketball facilities are available.
Gym is located beside Sholli mess.
South canteen is available on campus.
No restaurants near campus — only delivery services (Swiggy, Zomato) are available.
No laundry facilities available on campus. Students wash clothes themselves.
Medical facility is available on campus.
Medical timing: 8:30 AM to 4:30 PM.
Nearest airport is 14 km from campus.
Nearest railway station is 19 km from campus.

tourist: Dzukou Valley — famous valley trek near Kohima.
Kohima War Cemetery — World War II memorial.
Kisama Heritage Village — cultural hub, hosts the Hornbill Festival.

language_climate.languages: Hindi, English, and Naga languages are spoken.

notes: Tuition fee is exempted for SC/ST candidates.
Most economically backward students (family income less than Rs 1 lakh per annum) get full remission of tuition fee.
Other economically backward students (family income Rs 1 lakh to Rs 5 lakh per annum) get remission of 2/3rd of tuition fee.
Dining charges are adjusted every month on per day basis calculation.

academics.timetable_note: B.Tech SEM-I for all branches runs from August to December 2025.
academics.class_timing: Classes run from 8:30 AM to 4:30 PM with breaks.
academics.groups: Grp-I: CIV, MECH, ECE. Grp-II: CSE, EEE, EIE.
